title: Engineering
description: Engineering is one of the most versatile career domains spanning technology, infrastructure, healthcare, manufacturing, aerospace and innovation.

title: Medicine
description: Medicine focuses on diagnosing, treating and preventing diseases while improving healthcare and quality of life.

title: Design
description: Design combines creativity with problem solving to create products, experiences and communication.

title: Law
description: Law involves understanding legal systems, protecting rights and representing individuals or organizations.

title: Management
description: Management focuses on planning, organizing and leading businesses and organizations.

title: Data Science & AI
description: Data Science and Artificial Intelligence use data, algorithms and machine learning to solve complex problems.
